actions.name: Oil Slick
actions.description: Effect: An oil spill is created in the [Blast] area for 5 rounds. Any creature that starts their Activation in, or enters the hazard gains @Affliction[slowed] 2 and is covered in Oil. If a creature covered in Oil attempts to use a Fire-Type move, the attack fails and they and all adjacent creature lose 4 Ticks of HP. If a creature covered in Oil is hit by a Fire-type move, they and all they and all adjacent creature lose 4 Ticks of HP.
